scope: sampled Stage B learning-dynamics matrix under the fixed five-reservoir HAPPO setting

tau_J.unit: fraction of Baseline mean evaluator return
tau_J.direction: candidate mean evaluator return must be no more than 5% below Baseline
tau_J.basis: default value used by the public response-dataset builder and reported as a tolerance gate, not as a universal management threshold

tau_CV.unit: coefficient of variation of evaluator return
tau_CV.direction: candidate return CV must not exceed 0.10
tau_CV.basis: default return-variability tolerance used to screen unstable configurations within the sampled matrix

tau_R.unit: fractional degradation versus Baseline for directional risk diagnostics
tau_R.direction: directional risk diagnostics must not exceed Baseline by more than 10%
tau_R.basis: default operational-risk tolerance used by the public response-dataset builder for sampled acceptability screening

evaluator_return_definition: cumulative reward obtained by a trained policy under the common evaluation protocol, separated from learner-side losses and update diagnostics
implementation_note: Some analysis tables may retain legacy column names such as robust_flag or robust_reason for backward compatibility; in the manuscript they should be interpreted as sampled acceptability flags, not as basin-wide robustness claims.
interpretation_limits: not a dense continuous response surface
